# Sachin Rai — Where AI Meets Enterprise Selling

> A build log from an Enterprise AE at Freshworks who ships AI tools at night.
> 7× President's Club · $2.3M ACV · 200% quota attainment.

## About

Sachin Rai writes about the intersection of AI and enterprise GTM:
- AI tools he's built to prospect faster, close bigger, and automate the grind
- What's actually changing in enterprise sales (not the hype version)
- Claude Code workflows, multi-agent pipelines, and real build logs

## Posts

- [Win Rate Lies.](https://sachinai.com/posts/win-rate-trap.html) — A 90% win rate signal in my trading system was bleeding money at −1.04% expectancy per trade. The same Trojan Horse is hiding in every sales pipeline I've managed.
- [I Renamed Seven AI Agents.](https://sachinai.com/posts/renamed-seven-agents.html) — Brick, Owl, Bull, Falcon, Spider, Arrow, Sage are dead. Scanner, Grader, SwingTrader, DayPut, DayCondor, Outreach, Vault are alive. The rename touched 26 files. The lessons compound.
- [How I Built a Portfolio Monitor That Fires Every Morning at 5am](https://sachinai.com/posts/portfolio-monitor.html) — Connecting Alpaca, Claude, and launchd to build a fully autonomous pre-market briefing agent that wakes up before I do.
- [Why My Obsidian Vault Is the Most Valuable Thing I Own](https://sachinai.com/posts/obsidian-vault.html) — 500+ notes. 3 years of weekly compile runs. How turning raw captures into structured intelligence actually compounds.
- [NVIDIA's AI Compute Stack: A Field Guide for Enterprise Sellers](https://sachinai.com/posts/nvidia-data-center-guide.html) — From H100 to Blackwell — the complete hierarchy of NVIDIA's data center hardware, explained for enterprise sellers who need to understand the infrastructure layer.
- [I built a personal LLM knowledge base in Obsidian. Here's what it actually looks like.](https://sachinai.com/posts/llm-knowledge-base-obsidian.html) — Raw data in, compiled wiki out. How I use Claude Code to turn everything I read and watch into a searchable, queryable knowledge base — and why this is the most underrated AI workflow right now.
- [Five Cheap Fixes Took My Vault From 7.5 To 9.5.](https://sachinai.com/posts/five-vault-fixes.html) — A 90-minute lint pass on a knowledge vault: 19 missing banners, 132 unindexed notes, 24 confidence gaps, 6 open concept gaps, plus a contradiction scan. Score 7.5 → 9.5. Here's the whole pass, the failures, and the pattern.
- [Most Second Brains Just Rotate.](https://sachinai.com/posts/compounding-systems.html) — I have 88 concept articles, 301 sources, 13 production agents. Most 'second brain' stacks fail because they confuse output with compounding. Three laws decide which yours is.
- [7 Things Every Club Winner Knows That Average Reps Don't](https://sachinai.com/posts/club-winner.html) — After 7 President's Club wins, here are the patterns I see in every top performer. None of them are tactics.
- [Claude Code Changed How I Build — A 30-Day Retrospective](https://sachinai.com/posts/claude-code-retrospective.html) — What happened when I stopped planning features and started just building them. The feedback loop is completely different now.
- [AutoQuant: What I Learned After 6 Months of Bayesian Signal Grading](https://sachinai.com/posts/autoquant.html) — Building a scanner that grades its own trades, re-weights conviction over time, and auto-journals every autopsy.
- [7 AI trends I'm tracking in 2026 — and the breakthrough nobody's talking about](https://sachinai.com/posts/ai-trends-2026-breakthrough-idea.html) — From compute explosions to org design collapse — what my AI research vault is actually telling me about where this goes next. Plus one non-obvious conclusion.
- [The AI tools replacing my sales stack in 2026](https://sachinai.com/posts/ai-sales-stack-2026.html) — From cold email scoring to deal review to prospect research — what I've actually replaced with AI tools and what still needs a human.
- [The Case for AI-First Outreach: How I Built My Own SDR in a Weekend](https://sachinai.com/posts/ai-first-outreach.html) — Using LangGraph, Apollo, and Claude to research prospects, score fit, and draft personalised emails — automatically.
- [Thirteen Agents in One Saturday.](https://sachinai.com/posts/13-agents-one-saturday.html) — I spawned 13 parallel Claude Code agents on a Saturday morning. Each shipped one feature for my trading system. One of them overturned the hypothesis from feature #1.

## Tools Built

- [Cold Email Generator](https://sachinai1981-web.github.io/cold-email-generator) — AI-powered cold email writer
- [Subject Line Scorer](https://sachinai1981-web.github.io/subject-line-scorer) — Score and rewrite cold email subject lines
